observed: The Date Format dropdown was opened successfully showing a listbox with 23 date format options. The dialog 'Document Settings' was visible with the heading present. The dropdown opened and showed all options. However, inspecting the source file packages/ui/primitives/select.tsx lines 66-74 reveals that SelectPrimitive.Viewport only has className 'p-1' (plus a conditional popper class) — the CSS classes 'max-h-60' and 'overflow-y-auto' are NOT applied to the Viewport element. The classes are absent from the component definition.
